/**
 * Centralized API configuration for KEEP-Up
 * 
 * All API modules import from here — single source of truth.
 * At build time, REACT_APP_API_URL is baked in from .env.
 * Fallback: same-host port 3002 (for local dev only).
 */export const API_URL=(()=>{// 1. Env var set at build time (production path)
//    Empty string = same-origin (nginx proxies /api/ to Node)
if(typeof process.env.REACT_APP_API_URL==='string')return process.env.REACT_APP_API_URL;// 2. Local development without nginx proxy: same host, API port
if(typeof window!=='undefined'){const apiPort=process.env.REACT_APP_API_PORT||'3002';return"".concat(window.location.protocol,"//").concat(window.location.hostname,":").concat(apiPort);}// 3. SSR / test fallback
return'http://localhost:3002';})();export default API_URL;
